events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, **critical** risk — an unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers inside is a direct OSHA 1926.652(a)(1) violation and an imminent cave-in hazard. Immediate actions required: stop work, evacuate, competent-person soil/inspection review, install sloping/benching/shoring/shielding, verify egress and spoil placement before re-entry.
